MINI MINUTES:

Jennifer Zarich, Esq., of Law Office of Jennifer Zarich, Tel. 415.407.9273, specially appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LYNETTE CALVIN, ROBERT JOLIVETTE and FRANCIS JOLIVETTE's Motion To Dismiss is Denied. Although the court has not received courtesy copies of the moving papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B, it appears from the opposition papers that the motion was served with insufficient notice.
